label: Inscura API URL
summary: Base URL of the running Inscura Local API service.

label: Inscura API Token
summary: Leave empty when the Inscura API service uses authMode=none.

label: Search result limit
summary: Maximum candidates requested from Inscura per search term.

label: Minimum automatic match score
summary: Candidates below this score are ignored during automatic matching.

label: Import Inscura collections
summary: When disabled, Plex collections are left unchanged.

label: Replace Plex collections
summary: When collection import is enabled, replace existing Plex collections with Inscura collection and series terms.
